description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a prominent upper receiver with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics and accessories. The rifle has a collapsible stock at the rear, designed for adjustable length and improved ergonomics. Its handguard is ribbed for grip and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, which is of medium profile and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the rifle is equipped with flip-up iron sights both at the front and rear. The pistol grip is textured for secure handling, and the overall design is angular and robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, full-length rail, detachable box magazine, and flip-up iron sights. The design is robust and angular, optimized for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the upper receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and the full profile of the barrel and stock.
